notes: All gestures pinned on firmware 6.5.2 via framebuffer oracle. EDIT [0x01] inserts default note / toggles. EDIT+RIGHT [0x05] = +1 (unit inc / note+1sem / enum next). EDIT+LEFT [0x81] = -1 (unit dec / note-1sem / enum prev). EDIT+UP [0x41] = +16 (nibble inc / octave up). EDIT+DOWN [0x21] = -16 (nibble dec / octave down). OPT+EDIT [0x03] = clear cell.
